summary: Backend API testing complete. All 10 requested endpoints pass. ObjectId serialization bugs FIXED. AI professions (18), villagers (12 starter), discoverable lands (5), and house schematics (5) all verified working.
passed_tests: POST /api/build - ObjectId fix VERIFIED, returns valid JSON (torch successfully built)
POST /api/trade/offer - ObjectId fix VERIFIED, returns valid JSON (trade offer created)
GET /api/professions - Returns all 18 AI professions with tier details
GET /api/villagers - Returns 12 starter villagers with profession_details
POST /api/villagers/{id}/work - Villager performs daily work, gains XP, produces output
POST /api/villagers/trade - Villagers can trade with each other
GET /api/world/seedling - Returns origin village 'The First Echo' with 7 locations
GET /api/world/lands - Returns 5 discoverable lands (eastern_plains, northern_mountains, western_forest, southern_coast, underground_realm)
GET /api/world/houses - Returns 5 house types (campsite, cottage, house, manor, guild_hall)
POST /api/world/build-house - Player can build house in origin_village
critical_code_review_comments: ObjectId fix implemented correctly - response copies created BEFORE insert_one
All new endpoints follow pattern of excluding _id with projection {'_id': 0}
Starter villagers initialize on startup with proper profession-based skills
seed_data_creation: 12 starter AI villagers auto-initialized on startup: farmer, blacksmith, chef, miner, swordsman, archer, alchemist, merchant, priest, carpenter, butcher, scribe
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints are working. 18 AI professions defined across 7 tiers (commoner, craftsman, warrior, scholar, mystic, noble, leadership). 12 starter villagers auto-created. 5 discoverable lands available. 5 house types for building. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_ai_village_features.py can be reused for regression testing.
